title: Lesson: Arcane Explosion
description: Eldric will teach you Arcane Explosion, a powerful area-of-effect spell that unleashes a burst of arcane energy on all nearby enemies. To master this, you must demonstrate mastery of area control by defeating 5 groups of 3 or more enemies simultaneously.

steps.description: Defeat 5 groups of 3+ enemies with area attacks
Speak to Eldric to learn Arcane Explosion
